newspaper: Unknown (likely from Rio de Janeiro based on content)
original_snippet_context: Summary of parliamentary discussions and a project related to the Caixa de Conversão.
relevant_quote: Vibro as emendas apresentadas ao projecto que crea a Caixa de Conversão e taxa de cambio em 12d.
justification: The mention explicitly supports the creation of the Caixa de Conversão with a 12d exchange rate, a lower rate generally favored by expansionists aiming to alleviate deflation and support export sectors.
